steps.title: Focus on activation response
steps.content: The assertion is about sex-specific differences in response to neuron activation. The right evidence must compare how CNO changed activity for females and males relative to their saline-treated control groups.

steps.title: Compare each sex to its control
steps.content: The graph shows CNO-treated females becoming much more active than saline-treated females, while CNO-treated males remain close to saline-treated males. A misstates the start and end pattern, B discusses only saline groups, and D invents a male steep increase. The answer is C.
